summary:
Iteration 3 — editable Splash (Hero+Manifesto) + renamed admin tabs. Backend: 31/31 pytest pass including 4 new tests covering /api/site.settings shape with defaults, /api/admin/settings new field exposure, PUT persistence of hero/manifesto fields with reflection in /api/site, and backwards-compat default hydration. Frontend: /admin tabs render in correct order (Splash · Projects · Archive · Signals · Channels · Subscribers) with backward-compatible testids (admin-tab-{splash,projects,art,transmissions,settings,subscribers}). All 12 splash form testids present and editable (splash-hero-overline, splash-hero-title, splash-hero-body, splash-tagline, splash-secondary-cta, splash-manifesto-overline, splash-manifesto-heading, splash-manifesto-body, splash-manifesto-tags, splash-manifesto-caption, splash-save, splash-save-bottom). End-to-end live update verified: editing splash-hero-overline + splash-manifesto-heading and clicking splash-save → home page renders the new strings inside [data-testid='hero-overline'] and [data-testid='manifesto-heading']. RichText renders *...* as and \n as
. Channels tab: editing channels-discord and saving reflects in /api/site response.social.discord. All values reset to documented defaults afterwards (verified via final GET /api/site).
critical_code_review_comments: Backward-compat tab data-testids are intentionally preserved (admin-tab-art = Archive label, admin-tab-transmissions = Signals label, admin-tab-settings = Channels label). Documented in admin/tabs JSX. OK but worth a code comment near the tab array so future devs don't 'fix' the mismatch.

/api/admin/settings PUT requires the full SiteSettings shape — partial PUTs would null missing optional fields. SplashTab and ChannelsTab in Admin.jsx correctly read the existing settings first and merge before PUT. Acceptable for a singleton settings doc.

GET /api/site and GET /api/admin/settings both hydrate through `SiteSettings(**filtered)` so a legacy doc missing new fields still yields a complete payload. Verified via test_backwards_compat_missing_fields_filled_with_defaults.
RichText splits on * and \n — text containing a literal asterisk would be interpreted as emphasis. Probably fine for studio copy; document the convention near RichText.jsx for content editors.

Manifesto.jsx splits body on '

' to produce paragraphs — single 
 inside a paragraph becomes a hard break only if RichText processes it. Confirmed manifesto-paragraph-0 renders with full first paragraph content.
seed_data_creation: No new seed. Test temporarily set hero_overline=TEST_HERO_OVERLINE_<ts>, manifesto_heading=TEST_MANIFESTO_HEADING_<ts>, manifesto_tags=['test-tag-1','test-tag-2'], social.discord=https://discord.com/test-<ts>. All reset to documented defaults at end of run (verified via final GET /api/site).
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py now has 31 cases including TestSplashManifestoSettings (4 cases). UI selectors of note: admin-tab-{splash,projects,art,transmissions,settings,subscribers} (testids retained for back-compat with renamed labels), splash-{hero-overline,hero-title,hero-body,tagline,secondary-cta,manifesto-overline,manifesto-heading,manifesto-body,manifesto-tags,manifesto-caption,save,save-bottom}, channels-{discord,twitter,kickstarter,patreon,email,save}, hero-{overline,title,body,cta-primary,cta-secondary}, manifesto-{overline,heading,caption,paragraph-N}. After live-update tests, ALWAYS reset hero_overline='Studio · Opvs Primvm · MMXXVI', manifesto_overline='— Manifesto · §I', tagline='Enter the Construct.', social.discord='https://discord.com/'. Admin auth persists in sessionStorage; re-navigating to /admin can skip the login form.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
